choices.text: Bluebeam Revu most popular for PDF takeoff; PlanSwift, STACK alternatives. BIM auto-quantifies from 3D. RSMeans database for unit prices.
Project-wide indirect: PM/super, site office, port-a-johns, dumpsters, temp utilities, security. 6-15% of direct cost. Often forgotten by inexperienced estimators.
5-10% well-defined; 10-20% moderate uncertainty; 20-30%+ renovation. Owner + contractor often separate buffers. Risk register tracks specific hazards.
Bid bond (1%, guarantees signing), Performance bond (50-100% project, guarantees completion), Payment bond (guarantees subs paid). Cost 1-3% of bonded amount. Required public + most large private.
EVM (Earned Value Management): CPI = EV/AC <1 over budget; SPI = EV/PV <1 behind schedule. Monthly cost reports show variance + forecast at completion. Standard tracking for non-trivial projects.

questions.explanation: EVM: CPI + SPI for project health.
